accounts.name: pyth_price_feed
docs: Owner is verified to be the Pyth oracle program in the instruction body.

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: RwaConfig 초기화 (1회성). authority 설정, crank은 비활성 상태로 시작.

accounts.name: authority_usdc_account
docs: USDC 수신: 항상 property authority의 계좌 (signer와 무관)

errors.name: InsufficientTokenSupply
errors.msg: Insufficient token supply remaining.

errors.name: ExceedsInvestorCap
errors.msg: Exceeds individual investor cap (30%).

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow.

errors.name: NoPendingDividend
errors.msg: No pending dividend to claim.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized.

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: Invalid property status for this operation.

errors.name: FundingExpired
errors.msg: Funding deadline has passed.

errors.name: RefundNotAvailable
errors.msg: Refund conditions not met: goal was reached or deadline has not passed.

errors.name: AlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: This position has already been refunded.

errors.name: InvalidDeadline
errors.msg: Deadline must be in the future.

errors.name: ReleaseNotAvailable
errors.msg: Release conditions not met: not sold out and deadline not passed or goal not reached.

errors.name: AuthorityCannotInvest
errors.msg: The property authority cannot invest in their own property.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero.

errors.name: ZeroRevenue
errors.msg: Revenue must be greater than zero.

errors.name: FundsAlreadyReleased
errors.msg: Funds have already been released.

errors.name: InvalidFundingBps
errors.msg: Invalid funding bps: must be between 1 and 10000.

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Invalid price: must be greater than zero.

errors.name: DeadlineTooFar
errors.msg: Deadline too far in the future (max 365 days).

errors.name: FundingStillOpen
errors.msg: Funding period is still open. Wait until deadline passes.

errors.name: InvalidCrankAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid crank authority.

errors.name: StalePythPrice
errors.msg: Pyth price feed is stale (older than 60 seconds).

errors.name: PythConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Pyth price confidence interval is too wide (>= 2% of price).

errors.name: InvalidPythPrice
errors.msg: Pyth price is non-positive or failed to load.

errors.name: BookingNotPending
errors.msg: Booking escrow is not in Pending status.

errors.name: CheckOutNotPassed
errors.msg: Check-out time has not passed yet; cannot release escrow.

errors.name: InvalidRefundBps
errors.msg: guest_bps must be between 1 and 9999.

errors.name: AlreadySettled
errors.msg: Listing already settled for this month.

errors.name: InvalidBpsSum
errors.msg: bps split must sum to 10000.

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Operating cost exceeds vault balance.

errors.name: InvalidYearMonth
errors.msg: year_month format invalid (expected YYYYMM).
